summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MikroTik monitoring tool. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly. Successfully tested authentication, CRUD operations for PPPoE/Hotspot users, device management, report generation, and admin user management.

fixed_issues.issue: POST endpoints returning status 200 instead of 201

minor_navigation_issues.issue: Sidebar navigation clicks sometimes require sidebar expansion

passed_tests: Dashboard stats API and UI components
PPPoE users CRUD operations (list, create, update, search)
